Selling a Manual Supra Mk5 3.0 Premium MT in Absolute White. I'm relocating and I can't bring the car along with me.
I upgraded from an s2000 and the power and refinement of the car has been a dream.
The car has full ceramic coat with Ceramic Pro Gold package, Full Frontal PPF, and updated High End Focal Speakers with sound isolation from road noise while still retaining the beautiful B58 engine sounds.
Only protective and high end audio upgrades. Car is stock mechanically.
Upgrades:
Full Ceramic Coat + Full Frontal PPF installed by SV Auto - Ceramic Pro Gold package with 10 year warranty ($6k w/ receipts)
Sound Deadening from high end audio retailer Caracoustics - Reduced road noise + no isolation from the B58 engine tones. ($6k w/ receipts)
Upgraded to High end Focal Subwoofer and Speakers ($5k w/ receipts)
